name: SurveyMonkey
description: SurveyMonkey — Online survey and form builder with templates, logic branching, and analytics reporting.

seo.title: SurveyMonkey — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: SurveyMonkey: SurveyMonkey — Online survey and form builder with templates, logic branching, and analytics reporting.

when_to_use: NPS survey distributed post-onboarding with logic branching
Customer feedback form with real-time analytics dashboard
Employee engagement survey with automated reminder sequences
Market research survey with quota-based response targeting
Product feedback form embedded in-app and synced to CRM

pros: Massive template library covers common use cases
cons: Pricing crept up aggressively over years
Typeform feels more modern and mobile-friendly
Enterprise features gated behind top tiers
review.verdict: Reliable workhorse survey tool; newer players like Typeform and Tally offer better UX for less.
review.best_for: Established teams running market research and NPS at scale
review.not_for: Startups wanting modern embeds and design flexibility
